_comment: TGraphormer: Traffic Graphormer for Spatiotemporal Traffic Speed Prediction
_paper: TGraphormer: A Graph Transformer for Traffic Forecasting
_model_size: Model size variant - determines embed_dim, depth, and heads
_graph_encoding: Graph structure features - centrality and spatial position encoding
_temporal_windows: Paper recommendation: 12 steps input/output (1 hour with 5-min intervals)
_regularization: Weight decay and gradient clipping from paper
_lr_scheduler_note: Changed from 'cosinelr' to 'cosineannealinglr' - LibCity standard scheduler. Custom 'cosinelr' only available in PDFormer executor.
_lr_T_max_note: Set to max_epoch for full cosine annealing cycle. Adjust based on dataset (e.g., 50 for PEMS-BAY).
_warmup_note: Warmup not supported by standard TrafficStateExecutor. Consider custom executor if warmup is critical.
_dataset_compatibility: Works with TrafficStatePointDataset - compatible with METR_LA, PEMS_BAY, PEMSD3-8, etc.
_requirements: Requires adjacency matrix (adj_mx) in data_feature for graph structure encoding
_loss_function: Huber loss (smooth L1) as used in original implementation

_size_variants._description: Configure model_size parameter to select variant
_size_variants._note: Larger models may require reduced batch_size and learning_rate adjustment

_hyperparameter_tuning._batch_size_range: 64 for mini/small, 32 for med, 16 for big/large/xl
